AUTOMATON-ENCODE.title: Encode
AUTOMATON-ENCODE.description:
Encode a card.
When 3 cards are Encoded, their effects (other than Encode) are merged into a Function that costs [blue]1[/blue]
AUTOMATON-COMPILE.title: Compile
AUTOMATON-COMPILE_ERROR.title: Compile Error
AUTOMATON-COMPILE.description:
An effect that triggers when this card is merged into a Function.
Can be negative effect, which is referred to as an 'Error'.
AUTOMATON-STATUS.title: Status
AUTOMATON-STATUS.description: Status cards are removed at the end of combat.
AUTOMATON-CYCLE.title: Cycle
AUTOMATON-CYCLE.description: Discard a card, drawing a new card to replace it.
AUTOMATON-INSERT.title: Insert
AUTOMATON-INSERT.description: Shuffle a card into you [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
